text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our mission to improve lives starts at the top.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our culture of innovation and responsibility starts with our board of directors and extends out to every member of the company. Our board members work closely with AbbVie leaders to maintain our focus of putting patients first.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Robert A. Michael

Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
AbbVie Inc.
North Chicago, Illinois

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Roxanne S. Austin

President
Austin Investment Advisors
Newport Coast, California

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
William H.L. Burnside

Retired Senior Vice President and Director
The Boston Consulting Group
Los Angeles, California

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Jennifer L. Davis

Chief Executive Officer, Health Care
Procter & Gamble
Cincinnati, Ohio

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Thomas J. Falk

Retired Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
Kimberly-Clark Corporation
Dallas, Texas

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Thomas C. Freyman

Retired Executive Vice President, Finance and Administration
Abbott Laboratories
Abbott Park, Illinois

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Brett J. Hart

President
United Airlines Holdings, Inc.
Chicago, Illinois

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Melody B. Meyer

Retired President
Chevron Asia Pacific Exploration and Production
Houston, Texas

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Susan E. Quaggin, M.D.

Irving S. Cutter Professor and Chair of Medicine
Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine
Chicago, Illinois

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Edward J. Rapp

Retired Group President for Resource Industries
Caterpillar Inc.
Peoria, Illinois

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Rebecca B. Roberts

Retired President
Chevron Pipe Line Company
Houston, Texas

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Frederick H. Waddell

Former Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
Northern Trust Corporation and The Northern Trust Company
Chicago, Illinois

title.title: Committee Assignments of the Board of Directors

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Audit Committee

Frederick Waddell, chair
Roxanne Austin
William Burnside
Jennifer Davis
Thomas Falk
Melody Meyer
Edward Rapp

Roxanne Austin

Thomas Freyman
Frederick Waddell

Roxanne Austin
